chapter_title.en: What Defiles Clothing and the Body

text: 162 - وَقَالَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلنُّعْمَانِ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: أَخْرُجُ مِنَ اَلْخَلاَءِ فَأَسْتَنْجِي بِالْمَاءِ فَيَقَعُ ثَوْبِي فِي ذَلِكَ اَلْمَاءِ اَلَّذِي اِسْتَنْجَيْتُ بِهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكَ شَيْءٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.162 - Muhammad ibn al-Nu'man asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
'I leave the restroom and perform istinja (cleansing) with water, and my clothing falls into the water used for istinja. Is there anything upon me?'
Imam (as) said: 'There is no harm in it, and it does not affect you.'".
